news-global-econ.title: Jack Leiter's struggles at home give Minnesota Twins a pitching edge in American League clash
news-global-econ.description: Twins starter Joe Ryan holds Rangers hitters to just a .143 batting average as Minnesota faces Texas in a compelling American League pitching mismatch.

news-global-econ.title: Prestige Hospitality reported to have put IPO plans on hold, explores stake sale instead
news-global-econ.description: Prestige Estates halts IPO plans for its hospitality unit, opting to explore a minority stake sale to private equity investors.

news-global-econ.title: Jobless Claims Fall, Signaling Ongoing Strength in Labor Market
news-global-econ.description:
New claims for unemployment benefits declined last week, indicating that the labor market remains resilient and demand for American workers is high.

news-global-econ.title: Steep decline for minority and female leads in film, UCLA Hollywood diversity report finds
news-global-econ.description: UCLA's annual Hollywood Diversity Report revealed BIPOC and female representation in lead roles dropped below proportion levels compared to previous years.

news-global-econ.title: Ericsson names Narvinger CEO after Ekholm’s nine-year stint
news-global-econ.description: Ekholm, 63, will stay on as an adviser until June 2027. Narvinger inherits a company navigating its way out of a period of depressed demand for telecom equipment and lackluster spending on 5G network upgrades

news-global-soc.title: AI is making huge changes in how wars are fought. We aren’t ready for what comes next
news-global-soc.description: AI is rapidly changing warfare by compressing decision cycles from hours to seconds, creating a new arms race centered on data pipelines and models.
